steps.title: Recognize the exponential function form
steps.content: The equation $E(t) = 5(1.8)^t$ is an exponential function in the form $a \cdot b^t$. In this form, $a$ (the coefficient) represents the initial value when $t = 0$. Here, $a = 5$ and $b = 1.8$.

steps.title: Evaluate at the opening moment
steps.content:
Since $t$ represents years since opening, $t = 0$ is when the restaurant opened. Evaluate:

$$E(0) = 5(1.8)^0 = 5 \cdot 1 = 5$$

There were 5 employees when the restaurant opened. This is the initial count, which is choice A — A is correct.
